action.reasoning: Observation: Current best ic_mean 0.057898 from two-model LightGBM ensemble (DART+GBDT); CatBoost ensemble slightly lower (0.057803); 10-model equal-average gave lower IC (0.055748) despite higher rank_IC. Analysis: simple averaging dilutes strong models; weighting by validation IC should improve ensemble. We have 12 LightGBM models (10 from ensemble_ckpt + 2 best). Decision: write compute_weights.py to calculate validation IC for each model, save weights.json in ensemble_ckpt, update predict.py for weighted averaging, then submit eval. No training required, very fast.
